query: storm building, waves getting rough
man overboard, someone fell in the water
I cut my hand badly and it won't stop bleeding
how do I signal for help or send a distress call
I'm freezing, shivering and can't warm up
exhausted on night watch, struggling to stay awake
lost my bearings, not sure which way land is
feeling panicked and overwhelmed, heart racing
the water is glowing blue at night
water suddenly feels much colder here
strong current seems to be pulling the boat sideways
strange tall clouds on the horizon, what weather is coming
lots of birds diving into the water ahead
bored and restless, need something to do out here
feeling hopeless and alone, why did I even come out here
what daily routine keeps me sane on a long passage
waves are slamming into the side of us
crew member went over the side, he's in the sea
burned my arm on the stove, skin is blistering
twisted my ankle on deck and it's swelling up
feel like throwing up from all this rocking
how do I call mayday on the radio
teeth chattering, fingers numb with cold
so sleepy I keep nodding off at the helm
no idea where I am anymore, everything looks the same
can't stop shaking, my mind is spiraling
sparkles light up the wake when I stir the water
a dark wall of cloud is building on the horizon
nothing to look forward to out here, feeling really low
give me a small task to keep my mind busy
